title: Ubiquiti EdgeSwitch ES-16-150W
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / Edge Switches
description: Gigabit L3 PoE switch Ubiquiti EdgeSwitch ES-16-150W in 19" rackmount design with maximum PoE power 150W . Manageable switch with 16 gigabit metallic ports + (2) Gigabit SFP ports and 36Gbps total throughput Its biggest advantage is Gigabit PoE on each port, which can be set to be active PoE 802.3af/at with maximum power 34.2W/port or passive 24V with maximum power 17W/por . Automatic detection ensures full functionality of 802.3af and 802.3at devices without prior configuration. Passive 24V PoE must be set manually. Thanks to these features, one active element can be used to power all devices in your network! Designed for convenient management, the EdgeSwitch Configuration Interface allows administrators to configure and monitor switch features in a graphical user interface. The EdgeSwitch uses a sophisticated operating system that provides basic switching features, PoE configuration per port, and a variety of advanced features including: MSTP/RSTP/STP, VLAN, Link Aggregation, DHCP snooping, RADIUS, 802.1X and much more Device Rackmount screws Power cord
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (16) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1000Mbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, Passive 24V PoE Out ports 16 PoE budget [W] 150 Max. power consumption [W] 150 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 443 Height [mm] 43 Depth [mm] 221 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 36 MAC address table 16000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 26,78
